Prospective paired benchmark design

Pre-results artifact: this page contains no measurements or ranking.

Frozen identity

  • Project: synthetic-modern-atlas-blockwise

  • Available subject meshes: 5

Declared protocol

  • Subject-prefix sizes: 1, 3, 5
  • Repeats per condition: 5
  • Warm-ups per repeat: 1
  • Order seed: 20260722
  • Pairwise tiles: 64 × 64

Frozen condition order

SequencePairSubjectsStrategy Separate raw-report directory
1subjects-000055standardconditions/condition-001-subjects-00005-standard
2subjects-000055recomputeconditions/condition-002-subjects-00005-recompute
3subjects-000033standardconditions/condition-003-subjects-00003-standard
4subjects-000033recomputeconditions/condition-004-subjects-00003-recompute

Analysis policy

Preserve separate raw reports; do not automatically select a winner, calculate speedup or significance, choose a preset, or extrapolate to a full workflow or larger cohort.

Scientific boundary

This artifact freezes a paired objective/gradient benchmark design before results exist. It performs no benchmark, statistical analysis, peak-memory measurement, full-workflow measurement, safe-preset selection, scaling inference, or 300-subject feasibility test.

Machine-readable design: study-design.json. Integrity sidecar: study-design.sha256.
